ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "current_medication" TEXT /* Current medications of the participant */,
  "informed_consent" INTEGER /* Informed consent status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., efficacy, safety, tolerability) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Study design (e.g., randomized, observational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the participant providing the data */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with this data */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index representing the trial phase or type of measurement */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart used to record data */,
  "true_percentage" REAL /* True percentage indicating actual efficacy */,
  "reported_percentage" REAL /* Reported percentage based on participant feedback */,
  "error" REAL /* Calculated error between true and reported percentages */,
  "data_collector" TEXT /* Name of the data collector */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_chart_name FOREIGN KEY ("chart_name") REFERENCES charts ("chart_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart type */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart type (e.g., Bar chart, Line chart) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart type */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the trial data */,
  "error_value" REAL /* Calculated error value for the data entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the error value represents */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., random, systematic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report summarizing trial findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., interim, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user authentication */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., clinical operations, data management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., on-site, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("data_id")
)
